---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem
What are you trying to do? What's the pain point with the current behaviour?

## Proposed solution
How would you like this to work? CLI examples are great if relevant.

```bash
claude-cfg new-command --some-flag
```

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you thought about and why they don't fit.

## Additional context
Anything else — links, related issues, prior art.
